Class SampleClaims

Namespace
Crews.PlanningCenter.Api.Tests.Dummies.OAuth
Assembly
Crews.PlanningCenter.Api.Tests.dll

Sample claims JSON responses for testing OIDC claims and userinfo endpoint.

public static class SampleClaims

Fields

ClaimsWithoutTimestamps

Claims without optional exp and iat fields.

public const string ClaimsWithoutTimestamps = "{\r\n\t\"iss\": \"https://api.planningcenteronline.com\",\r\n\t\"sub\": \"1234567890\",\r\n\t\"name\": \"Jane Smith\",\r\n\t\"email\": \"jane.smith@example.com\",\r\n\t\"organization_id\": 456,\r\n\t\"organization_name\": \"Another Organization\"\r\n}"

Field Value

string

ExpiredIdTokenPayload

An expired ID token payload. iat: 946684800 (2000-01-01 00:00:00 UTC) exp: 946688400 (2000-01-01 01:00:00 UTC) - expired

public const string ExpiredIdTokenPayload = "{\r\n\t\"iss\": \"https://api.planningcenteronline.com\",\r\n\t\"sub\": \"1234567890\",\r\n\t\"aud\": \"test_client_id\",\r\n\t\"name\": \"John Doe\",\r\n\t\"email\": \"john.doe@example.com\",\r\n\t\"organization_id\": 123,\r\n\t\"organization_name\": \"Test Organization\",\r\n\t\"iat\": 946684800,\r\n\t\"exp\": 946688400\r\n}"

Field Value

string

MinimalClaims

Minimal claims (only required fields).

public const string MinimalClaims = "{\r\n\t\"sub\": \"9876543210\",\r\n\t\"name\": \"Minimal User\",\r\n\t\"email\": \"minimal@example.com\",\r\n\t\"organization_id\": 789,\r\n\t\"organization_name\": \"Minimal Org\"\r\n}"

Field Value

string

ValidIdTokenPayload

An ID token payload with expiration and issued-at timestamps. iat: 1704067200 (2024-01-01 00:00:00 UTC) exp: 1704070800 (2024-01-01 01:00:00 UTC)

public const string ValidIdTokenPayload = "{\r\n\t\"iss\": \"https://api.planningcenteronline.com\",\r\n\t\"sub\": \"1234567890\",\r\n\t\"aud\": \"test_client_id\",\r\n\t\"name\": \"John Doe\",\r\n\t\"email\": \"john.doe@example.com\",\r\n\t\"organization_id\": 123,\r\n\t\"organization_name\": \"Test Organization\",\r\n\t\"iat\": 1704067200,\r\n\t\"exp\": 1704070800,\r\n\t\"nonce\": \"test_nonce_value\"\r\n}"

Field Value

string

ValidUserInfoResponse

A complete userinfo response with all claims.

public const string ValidUserInfoResponse = "{\r\n\t\"iss\": \"https://api.planningcenteronline.com\",\r\n\t\"sub\": \"1234567890\",\r\n\t\"aud\": \"test_client_id\",\r\n\t\"name\": \"John Doe\",\r\n\t\"email\": \"john.doe@example.com\",\r\n\t\"organization_id\": 123,\r\n\t\"organization_name\": \"Test Organization\"\r\n}"

Field Value

string
